The diagnoses listed are primarily related to pulmonary issues (Other diseases of lung, not elsewhere classified; Pleurisy without mention of effusion or current tuberculosis), cardiac conditions (Congestive heart failure, unspecified; Other primary cardiomyopathies; Mitral valve disorders; Unspecified essential hypertension; Other specified cardiac dysrhythmias), and other systemic issues (Personal history of contact with and (suspected) exposure to asbestos; Other iatrogenic hypotension).

The medications prescribed include Furosemide, Carvedilol, Zolpidem Tartrate, Bisacodyl, Docusate Sodium, Nesiritide, Oxycodone-Acetaminophen, Potassium Chloride, Magnesium Oxide, Acetaminophen, Neutra-Phos, Tamsulosin HCl, Valsartan, Hydromorphone P.F., Bupivacaine 0.5%, Phenylephrine HCl, NS Epidural Bag, Heparin, Aspirin, Digoxin, Metoprolol, Pantoprazole, Magnesium Sulfate, Lorazepam.
